name.ja: <ruby>道化の一座<rt>クラウン・クラン</rt></ruby> ハット

pendulum_effect.en: During your Main Phase: You can send 1 "Clown Crew" card from your Deck to your GY, except a Pendulum Monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card, also you cannot activate the effects of monsters Special Summoned from the Deck or Extra Deck until the end of the next turn. You can only use this effect of "Clown Crew Hat" once per turn.

ja.set_name: Yu-Gi-Oh! OCG Structures Volume 12 promotional card
